text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I've come to the mountains to get a break
from work. As I walk through the lush greenery...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Aah... Isn't this nice? Deciding to go trail running
was a great idea.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Except you kept ducking off the beaten path...
But you're right, this does feel nice!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Look, Maruzen, there's a rest area over there.
Good timing too. I could use a snack.

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
I'm telling you, eating rice balls while hiking the
mountain trail is poor etiquette!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
Seaweed and salt are from the sea. It's improper
to bring items belonging to the ocean god into
the realm of the mountain god!

text_block_list.name: Hiker
text_block_list.text: Um... Oh... I see. I never knew that... Sorry.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Goodness. What a fussy person.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Chomp. Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
What?! Y-y-you there! Was that a rice ball you
just ate?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I didn't even get a chance to stop you before you
ate it all. Oh, C.B....

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Gulp. Mm. Can't go wrong with salmon.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Be careful where you step, Maruzen! The center
of the bridge looks safe, so stick to it!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
Hold it there! Were you not listening to what I
just said?!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
The right way to cross a rope bridge is to walk
humbly along the side! Tramping through the
center makes you look like an arrogant fool!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
In order to make sure you don't fall while hiking
up a mountain, you should stop and check each
of your steps before committing to it!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Excuse us! We'll just pass on ahead, if you don't
mind. We've got to keep up a good pace if we
want to make it all the way up to the top.

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text: RRRRRGH!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
Just who do you think you are?! I've never met
someone so selfish!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text:
That self-centered attitude of yours is making
everyone around you uncomfortable! Have some
common courtesy and follow the rules!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I don't have to listen to the nonsense you're
spouting.

text_block_list.name: Hiker
text_block_list.text: D-did she really just say that?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Purposely making that old rope bridge sway was
dangerous, and you'll overexert yourself hiking if
you don't go at your natural pace.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But I don't really get it. Aren't you just calling
your own personal opinions "rules"?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
So why should I do what you say? I can think for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay, let's settle down, everyone! Getting
upset at each other won't solve anything. ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep this trip a good one. It'd be
disrespectful to the mountain otherwise. ♪

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text: ...I won't forget this!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Maruzen. I overdid it again, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're just so blunt, is all. You always have
to speak up about things you don't agree with
and charge straight into arguments.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But I like that about you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's admirable how free-spirited she is and how
she sticks to what she believes in, though her
strong will seems to land her in trouble often...
choice_data_list: It's impressive how true you are to yourself.
Don't make things too hard on yourself.
Don't make things too hard on yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's admirable how free-spirited she is and how
she sticks to what she believes in, though her
strong will seems to land her in trouble often...
choice_data_list: It's impressive how true you are to yourself.
Don't make things too hard on yourself.
Don't make things too hard on yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Is it? I'm just following what my heart tells me.
choice_data_list: Following your heart is what makes you strong.
Following your heart is what makes you strong.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I don't know about that. But if that's what your
heart says, then maybe you're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to trust my intuition and believe what I
said is true, and to see for myself just what her
running is like.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Is it? I'm just following what my heart tells me.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
For example, do you feel that pleasant breeze?
Let's sprint all the way down the mountain now!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Because I can't suppress this urge to go running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her awkwardness and refusal to compromise on
her beliefs may be the secret to her strength. I
decide to see for myself just what her running is
like.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: It's harder to keep quiet. After all...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
This is my life. I don't want to blindly follow things
I don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her awkwardness and refusal to compromise on
her beliefs may be why she's so strong. I decide to
see for myself just what her running is like.
